routing_rules.heartbeat: claude-3-5-haiku — cheap, fast, sufficient for parsing and health checks.
routing_rules.email: claude-3-5-haiku — email triage and summaries don't need heavy reasoning.
routing_rules.writing: claude-sonnet-4-6 — best writing output, right cost.
routing_rules.coding: gpt-5.6-sol primary for hard implementation, gpt-5.6-terra or claude-sonnet-4-6 fallback.
routing_rules.strategic: gpt-5.6-sol and claude-opus-4-8 for deepest reasoning; gpt-5.6-terra fallback for cost-balanced thinking.
routing_rules.research: grok-4-latest primary where available, with gpt-5.6-terra as the OpenAI fallback.
routing_rules.ops: claude-sonnet-4-6 — Telegram, customer responses, routine decisions.

fallback_triggers.daily_cap_hit: drop to next cheaper model in route chain
